description_long: This coupe car features a classic muscle car design with a long hood, short rear deck, and a low, aggressive stance. The body is predominantly metallic gray with blacked-out windows and dark wheels, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The front end showcases a wide grille and subtle hood scoop, while the rear is defined by rectangular taillights and a clean, angular trunk. Side exhaust pipes and vent details on the fenders add to its sporty character. The car has two doors and a hardtop roofline, with minimal chrome accents and a streamlined silhouette. The overall look is reminiscent of American muscle cars from the late 1960s to early 1970s, designed for both performance and style.
description: A metallic gray, two-door coupe with a classic muscle car silhouette, blacked-out windows, and sporty side exhausts. Features a long hood, short rear deck, and hardtop roofline.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, hood scoop, and aggressive stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door configuration, side exhausts, and vented fender details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays rectangular taillights, a clean trunk, and the hardtop roofline.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe's streamlined profile and dark wheels.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
